office_address: 560 S 300 E, Salt Lake City, UT 84111
emergency_definition: storm damage to windows needing immediate assessment
post-construction window cleanup required before building inspection

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: take the caller's information and guarantee a callback within 1 hour during business hours

non_emergency_routing_rules: collect name, phone, address, number of windows or description of the job, and schedule an estimate

emergency.fallback: take the caller's information and guarantee a callback within 1 hour during business hours

routing_rules.non_emergency: collect name, phone, address, number of windows or description of the job, and schedule an estimate

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: Sorry about that! Let me grab your name and number and I'll make sure someone gets back to you today.

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt dispatch, if no take message and assure next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine purpose, collect name and number, schedule appointment or transfer to team member, confirm next steps, close.
industry: window cleaning and exterior cleaning for residential and commercial clients
service_area: the greater Salt Lake City area including Park City
pricing_model: per-window pricing for residential and per-square-foot for commercial contracts
peak_season: spring because everyone wants clean windows after winter
greeting_style: Hey! Thanks for calling ClearView Window Cleaning — how can we brighten up your day?
call_objective: s is to book free on-site estimates and build up recurring commercial contracts
objection_handling: not sure if worth the cost
follow_up_procedure: send before/after photos to the customer via text within 24 hours
notes: offer a 15% discount for customers who book recurring quarterly service.
